headline: DA Davidson Sees Starbucks (SBUX) Turnaround Progress but Initiates at Neutral
summary: Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) is included among the 13 Best Defensive Dividend Stocks for 2025. On March 6, DA Davidson initiated coverage of Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) with a Neutral rating. It set a $97 price target on the stock. The firm said the company’s turnaround efforts appear to have repositioned the business for more sustainable growth. […]
